_publications._publicationTitle: A qualitative study of the impact of plexiform neurofibromas on need fulfilment in adults with neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Only four examples were found where a specific issue was raised in one country only... In all other respects, the interviewees in each country raised the same issues when describing the impact of their condition.
details: Demonstrated cross-cultural consistency with only 4 country-specific issues identified between UK and US interviews, while all other themes were consistent across both populations
